title: Madikeri
summary: Chapter 9 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled Madikeri. Theme: Madikeri becomes beautiful because she is there.
sceneDescription: Madikeri is a cool mountain memory of mist, road, and the feeling that forever might be possible.
